name: Datamuse_find_related_words
description: Find words related by meaning, sound, or spelling using the Datamuse word-finding API. Supports finding synonyms (ml), words that sound similar (sl), words that rhyme (rel_rhy), words related by trigger (rel_trg), and more. Returns words with relevance scores. No authentication required. Useful for NLP, creative writing, crossword solving.

ml.description: Words with similar meaning to this word/phrase. Examples: 'ringing in the ears', 'happy', 'fast'

sl.description: Words that sound like this word. Examples: 'jirraf', 'elefant'

sp.description: Words spelled like this pattern (* for wildcard). Examples: 'b*k', 't*tion'

rel_rhy.description: Words that rhyme with this word. Examples: 'spade', 'cat'

rel_trg.description: Words commonly associated with or triggered by this word. Examples: 'cow', 'doctor'

data.description: Words matching the query with relevance scores

tags.description: Part of speech and other tags

name: Datamuse_find_words_with_context
description: Find words that fit naturally after or before a given word (word adjacency) using the Datamuse API. Useful for autocomplete, text prediction, and finding collocations. Also supports finding words that frequently appear in the context of a given topic. No authentication required.

lc.description: Words that typically follow this word (left context). Examples: 'drink', 'swimming'

rc.description: Words that typically precede this word (right context). Examples: 'pool', 'cream'

sp.description: Words spelled like this pattern. Use * for wildcard. Examples: 'b*k', 'tre*'

topics.description: Constrain to words related to this topic. Examples: 'medicine', 'music,jazz'

data.description: Words fitting the contextual query with scores
